series.title: Vikings 2026!
series.tagline: Longships return from the void to reclaim the frontier.
series.shortDescription: After vanishing in a wormhole centuries ago, a Norse fleet reappears with living star-maps and ancestral claims that ignite a three-way conflict over trade lanes, belief, and sovereignty.

series.title: Stardust Station
series.tagline: The neutral hub where peace is negotiated one docking at a time.
series.shortDescription: At the busiest transfer station in contested space, operators and medics keep traffic moving while smugglers, diplomats, and covert agents turn every arrival into a potential flashpoint.

series.title: Azure Reach
series.tagline: Beneath sapphire seas, a drowned archive can rewrite civilization.
series.shortDescription: On an ocean world of floating cities and abyssal ruins, survey crews race to recover submerged records that challenge accepted history and strain alliances between locals, scientists, and mining syndicates.

series.title: Sunforge Outlaw
series.tagline: A fugitive pilot turns solar industry into a revolution.
series.shortDescription: Hunted by a star-powered industrial state, a former convoy ace raids sunforge supply lines and rallies orbital workers to seize the foundries that run on captured stellar fire.
